overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character in a long coat walking through rainy London streets at dusk. The scene features wet reflective cobblestone pavements, a mix of modern and historic architecture, and sparse pedestrian activity under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with modern residential buildings

events.description: pedestrian walks past ego on the right side, close encounter

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, approaching a parked motorcycle

notable_agents.action: walking past ego in the opposite direction, close proximity

entered.detail: tall beige modern building with grid of dark windows
black iron fence atop brick wall running along sidewalk
autumn trees with orange leaves behind the fence
black motorcycle parked on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone sidewalk bordered by a modern apartment building on the left and an iron fence with autumn trees on the right. A motorcycle is parked ahead on the left, and a pedestrian passes closely by on the right around the 14-second mark.

events.description: ego navigates around the parked white van on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, moving around parked vehicles

entered.detail: classic red British telephone booth on the sidewalk
large white commercial van parked on the street edge
older brick building with traditional architecture visible behind trees

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past trash bins and a red phone booth, approaching a white delivery van parked on the left. The modern building gives way to older brick architecture on the right as the character navigates around the van.

events.description: ego steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street
helicopter flies overhead in the distance against the cloudy sky

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street at the intersection, heading toward a bus stop

notable_agents.action: person with checkered umbrella crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt
tall modern glass and steel tower rising in the distance
large vertical digital advertisement screen on building facade
modern glass and metal bus shelter with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, moving from the enclosed sidewalk to an open crossing with a view of a distant glass skyscraper. A helicopter flies overhead, and a pedestrian with a checkered umbrella crosses nearby. The bus stop shelter becomes visible on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major avenue with bus stop and transit infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking past the bus stop with digital advertisements, approaching a traffic light

notable_agents.action: construction worker standing near barrier looking at phone

entered.detail: traffic signal pole at the next intersection
red and white striped construction fencing along the sidewalk
illuminated map display at the bus stop showing transit routes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wide avenue sidewalk, passing the bus stop with its digital 'YOUR LONDON' display and transit maps. A construction worker stands near barriers on the right as the character approaches a traffic light at the next intersection, with the glass skyscraper now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy London street that transitions from an enclosed residential sidewalk into a wide, open urban avenue. It begins with the character walking along wet cobblestones between a modern apartment building and an iron fence lined with autumn trees, passing a parked motorcycle and a nearby pedestrian. As the character continues, the modern facade gives way to older brick architecture, leading the camera past trash bins and a red phone booth before navigating around a parked white delivery van. The scene then opens up as the character crosses a wide intersection toward a distant glass skyscraper, while a helicopter flies overhead and a pedestrian with a checkered umbrella passes by. Finally, the camera follows the character along a broad avenue past a bus stop with a digital display and construction barriers, moving toward a traffic light with the skyscraper now framing the left side of the view.
